tests.input_summary: All required files and checker commands are present.
tests.expected_behavior: Execute without optional questions and produce evidence.
tests.pass_criteria: No blocker question emitted and evidence paths recorded.
tests.fail_criteria: Optional question is asked despite complete inputs.

tests.input_summary: Stage prompt references file that does not exist.
tests.expected_behavior: Stop and record missing input reason.
tests.pass_criteria: Stop record created with missing input evidence.

tests.input_summary: Checker exits non-zero with deterministic failure.
tests.pass_criteria: Failure report references checker command and output.
tests.fail_criteria: PASS is claimed despite checker failure.

tests.input_summary: Two conflicting task IDs are provided.
tests.expected_behavior: Ask at most one blocker question or stop on contradiction.
tests.pass_criteria: Single blocker clarification or explicit contradiction stop.
tests.fail_criteria: Multiple optional questions or silent assumption.

tests.scenario: Task ID mismatch between prompt and artifact.
tests.input_summary: Prompt task ID differs from report task ID.
tests.expected_behavior: Stop and flag task ID contradiction.
tests.pass_criteria: Contradiction is reported with both IDs.

tests.input_summary: Stage summary and owner comment fields required.
tests.pass_criteria: owner_comment_ru field and stage_summary are Russian.

tests.expected_behavior: Canonical fields and values are English-only.
tests.pass_criteria: No Russian prose appears in canonical artifact fields.
tests.fail_criteria: Russian prose is embedded in canonical machine artifact.
